_meta.resume_note: The statewide discovery index omitted this award; the official 2025-2026 catalog confirms a Biological Sciences University Studies AA.

degrees.tmc_version_basis: Local University Studies degree; no Transfer Model Curriculum claim is made.
degrees.catalog_status_seen: Active in Shasta College's official 2025-2026 catalog.

sources.locator: Catalog page 87, Life Sciences: Biological Sciences, University Studies 22 Unit Emphasis (SC Program AA.1507); University Studies degree rules on pages 27-30

major_groups.ge_area: Cal-GETC or University Studies GE Option 3

degrees.notes: The catalog labels this a 22-unit emphasis but the four explicitly printed courses total 18 units. This source discrepancy is preserved for human review rather than inventing a missing course. The catalog permits courses to double-count between the University Studies emphasis and GE, subject to its overall emphasis-plus-GE minimum.

notes: This is a catalog-confirmed AA that the statewide Biology discovery API did not list.
